name: prode-results
title: Prode Results Sync
description: Sync WC2026 match results from football-data.org into the prode Firestore, with dry-run and explicit confirmation before writing.
setup_instructions: Set FOOTBALL_DATA_API_TOKEN and GOOGLE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_FILE (or GOOGLE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON) in ~/.agent-skills/prode-results/.env

fields.name: GOOGLE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_FILE
fields.label: Firebase service account JSON path
fields.help: Path to a service account JSON with Firestore access to the prode project
